item.text:
I could not run the requested command from this shell because the runtime path is root-only.

What happened:
- `cd /root/popebot_runtime/builder_brain_system_copy && /root/popebot_runtime/scripts/push_fallback_to_github.sh`
- Result: `/bin/bash: line 1: cd: /root/popebot_runtime/builder_brain_system_copy: Permission denied`

Environment check:
- Current user: `coding-agent`
- `id`: `uid=1001(coding-agent) gid=1001(coding-agent) groups=1001(coding-agent)`
- `/root` permissions: `drwx------ root root`, so `/root/popebot_runtime/...` is not accessible

Because of that, I could not obtain:
1. `git remote -v`
2. `git log --oneline -n 1`
3. The last 20 lines of `/root/popebot_runtime/logs/github_backup.log`

If you want, I can help with the exact root-shell commands to run on the VPS so you can paste back the output.
